---
title: "Example Usage"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{example-usage}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(fatherStay)
```

This vignette subject to change, and will likely be out of date very shortly.

```{r}
df <- simulate_data() |>
  dplyr::filter(prov == "ON")
tail(df, 12) # last 10 are NA - to be nowcast!
```

```{r}
prepped_data <- prep_data(dad ~ npos, df, model = "lm", date_col = "date")
prepped_data

trained_data <- train_model(prepped_data)
trained_data

nowcasted <- nowcast(trained_data)
nowcasted
```

```{r}
dadnow <- prep_data(
    dad ~ npos, df, model = "lm", date_col = "date"
  ) |>
  train_model() |>
  nowcast()
dadnow$nowcasted_lm
```
